column1: # Source of truth: docs/duplicate-medication-assessment-guide.md §3.4 (L4 P0 endpoint groups)
# ATC codes verified against WHO ATC/DDD Index.
# member_subtype is optional — only nephrotoxic_triple_whammy uses it (nsaid | raas | diuretic).
# Lines starting with # are ignored by loader.
# MRA (affect K/renal — guide §3.4 explicitly lists with RAAS)
# ACEI + ARB + ARNI + DRI (reuse from raas_blockade)
# Non-selective beta-blockers (shift K extracellularly — add informational)
# TODO: 臨床藥師確認是否將 non-selective β-blocker（propranolol 等）納入 hyperkalemia 群組
# Rule engine: fire when ≥1 from each subtype coexist
# Diuretic subgroup — Loop (C03C) + Thiazide (C03A) + Thiazide-like (C03B) + MRA (C03D)
